codeReview.summary: Commit `a4bbeaa` is scoped to a one-line revert in `InitiateReviewPanel.vue` and cleanly restores the BRAN-specific selected-component summary without touching the close-emission fix or other submit-flow logic.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `designer-tracking-worker` procedure is heavier than needed for copy-only revert work: this worker reasonably skipped TDD, type-check/lint, and agent-browser verification because the feature was a one-line string restoration with existing regression coverage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md requires tests-first, type-check/lint, and manual browser verification, but the transcript for worker `105df676-d9af-4d8f-8365-fcd1b4de8231` documents a successful one-line copy revert validated by existing `src/components/review/form-binding.test.ts` and full `npm test` runs only.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and commit `a4bbeaa`. The feature does exactly one scoped copy revert in `src/components/review/InitiateReviewPanel.vue:185`, restoring the BRAN-specific summary text while leaving the earlier close-event fix intact, so the review passes.
